sector: Financial Services (Non-Bank) — Asset Management, FinTech & Fund Operations

condition_precedents: Fund administration fee benchmarked by AUM tier and fund type (equity, debt, hybrid, AIF)
Custodian / sub-custodian fee schedule reviewed and RFP issued to 3+ providers
Transfer agent costs benchmarked vs. AMC peer group (AMFI/SEBI regulatory context)
industry_sources: SEBI — Annual Report 2023-24 (sebi.gov.in/reports-and-statistics/) — mutual fund industry cost ratios and TER benchmarks
AMFI — Industry Data & Statistics (amfiindia.com/research-information) — fund administration cost trends in India
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

execution_playbook.step: Map current fund administration footprint: administrators, scope, AUM served, fee schedule, and contract term per fund
Benchmark total administration cost (bps on AUM) vs industry median; identify consolidation candidates by administrator quality and cost
Run competitive RFP for consolidated fund administration mandate; negotiate tiered fee schedule tied to AUM growth
Execute migration in fund-by-fund waves; validate NAV accuracy and SEBI/AMFI reporting continuity throughout transition

diagnostic_signals.signal: Fund administration cost (bps on AUM) >1.5× peer median for equivalent AUM scale and fund complexity
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Consolidation to a lower-cost administrator will reduce ongoing cost

diagnostic_signals.signal: Multiple fund administrators (>3) with duplicated onboarding, compliance, and reporting overhead
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Consolidation will reduce fixed overhead and improve scale economics

diagnostic_signals.signal: NAV error rate or restatement events >2 per year with current administrator
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Quality improvement case supports migration to higher-capability administrator

required_data_fields: Fund administration cost by fund and administrator (bps and absolute ₹)
AUM by fund and administrator
Contract terms, SLA, and break-clause provisions
NAV error/restatement history
SEBI/AMFI compliance requirement mapping

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Trading Technology & Market Data Cost Optimisation (OMS/EMS & Data Feeds)
condition_precedents: OMS/EMS license utilisation audit completed (user seats vs. active traders benchmarked)
Market data cost analysis by provider and consumption (Bloomberg, Refinitiv, ICE, MSCI, etc.)
Data usage governance policy implemented — tier-down unused terminals; negotiate enterprise caps
industry_sources: SEBI — Market Infrastructure Institutions Report 2024 (sebi.gov.in) — trading technology regulatory requirements
Gartner — Market Guide for Capital Markets Technology 2024 (gartner.com) — trading platform consolidation savings
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

execution_playbook.step: Audit trading technology stack: OMS, EMS, market data, connectivity, and co-location costs; map to actual usage and trading volume
Conduct broker TCA (Transaction Cost Analysis) for top-20 brokers; identify underperforming brokers vs execution cost
Rationalise OMS/EMS platforms to single consolidated system; negotiate multi-asset market data contract vs single-feed providers
Optimise co-location and connectivity footprint; track commission spend per broker against execution quality metrics

diagnostic_signals.signal: Trading technology cost (OMS, market data, connectivity) >5 bps of AUM vs benchmark <3 bps
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Platform rationalisation will reduce per-AUM technology cost

diagnostic_signals.signal: Redundant OMS/EMS platforms or market-data feeds for the same asset class
Broker commission paid to bottom-5 brokers generating >20% of total commission with below-median execution quality
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Broker panel rationalisation will improve cost and execution quality

required_data_fields: Trading technology cost inventory (OMS, EMS, market data, co-location, connectivity)
Broker commission data by broker (12 months) with execution quality metrics
Trading volume by asset class and broker
OMS/EMS vendor contracts and SLAs
TCA analysis output for top-20 brokers

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Regulatory Compliance Operations Automation (SEBI / MiFID II / AML Reporting)
condition_precedents: Compliance operations process map completed — regulatory reporting cost per report quantified
RegTech platform evaluated (Behavox, Axiom SL, or equivalent for SEBI/MiFID coverage)
Parallel run validation completed before sunsetting manual compliance reporting workflows
industry_sources: SEBI — Compliance Framework for Registered Entities (sebi.gov.in/legal/circulars/) — regulatory compliance automation requirements
Ardent Partners — AP Metrics That Matter 2024 (ardentpartners.com/ap-metrics-that-matter-in-2025/) — compliance process automation benchmarks
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

execution_playbook.step: Inventory all SEBI/IRDAI/RBI regulatory obligations: return frequency, data source, FTE-hours, and manual touchpoints per obligation
Select RegTech platform for compliance workflow automation; confirm SEBI technical specifications for digital filing
Automate high-frequency returns (daily/weekly NAV, portfolio disclosure, AUM reporting) in Phase 1; quarterly filings in Phase 2
Run parallel filing for one quarter; obtain internal-audit sign-off and submit first automated return to SEBI/IRDAI
Decommission manual filing process; track FTE release, error rate, and on-time submission rate

diagnostic_signals.signal: Compliance team >10 FTEs with >60% of time on data extraction and regulatory report preparation
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Automation will release FTE capacity and reduce compliance cost

diagnostic_signals.signal: Late or restated regulatory filings ≥2 in the past year due to data or formatting errors
Number of SEBI/IRDAI returns >20 with data sourced from ≥5 systems requiring manual reconciliation
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Integration and automation investment is justified

required_data_fields: Regulatory return inventory (name, regulator, frequency, source systems, FTE-hours)
Compliance team FTE count and time allocation per return
RegTech vendor landscape and integration requirements
Late/restated filing history with root cause
SEBI/IRDAI technical specification for digital filing

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Performance Attribution & Risk Platform Consolidation (Bloomberg/MSCI/FactSet Overlap)
condition_precedents: Performance attribution and risk platform inventory completed (Bloomberg PORT, MSCI RiskMetrics, FactSet, Axioma, etc.)
Functional overlap matrix produced — capabilities covered by multiple vendors identified
Investment committee approval for platform consolidation roadmap (18-month decommission plan)
industry_sources: INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

execution_playbook.step: Audit current performance attribution system: coverage (funds, asset classes), calculation frequency, and reporting latency
Benchmark attribution vendor options vs current system on cost, coverage, and integration capability with portfolio management system
Migrate to consolidated attribution platform; integrate with OMS and portfolio management system for automated data feed
Automate daily attribution report generation and distribution to portfolio managers and clients; decommission manual reporting

diagnostic_signals.signal: Performance attribution reporting prepared manually for >50% of funds, consuming >3 FTE-days per quarter
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Automation will materially reduce performance reporting cost

diagnostic_signals.signal: Attribution system covers <80% of AUM by asset class (e.g., fixed income or alternatives not covered)
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Expanded platform will close coverage gaps and improve reporting quality

diagnostic_signals.signal: Client or regulator queries on performance discrepancies >5/quarter due to attribution methodology inconsistencies
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Standardised automated attribution will reduce exceptions and reputational risk

required_data_fields: AUM by fund and asset class with attribution coverage status
Current attribution system cost and FTE overhead
Performance attribution vendor options and pricing
OMS and portfolio management system integration architecture
Client reporting SLA requirements

sector_specific_levers.lever_name: Investment Research Cost Management (MiFID II Unbundling & Broker Vote Optimisation)
condition_precedents: Research budget and broker vote allocation reviewed against actual consumption
Research provider panel rationalised — tier 1/2/3 classification with spend caps by tier
Internal research capability assessed vs. external cost (in-house vs. outsourced decision)
industry_sources: SEBI — Research Analyst Regulations 2014 & Amendments (sebi.gov.in) — unbundling framework for investment research
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.

execution_playbook.step: Audit research consumption under MiFID II/SEBI framework: identify all research providers, vote allocation, and annual spend by fund
Assess research quality and utilisation per provider using portfolio manager feedback and vote data; identify low-utilisation providers
Rationalise research provider panel from bottom; consolidate budget to highest-value providers; negotiate direct pricing vs CSA
Implement research management platform to track consumption vs budget; enforce per-fund research budget allocation

diagnostic_signals.signal: Research budget per AUM >3 bps vs fund industry median for equivalent strategy complexity
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Research spend rationalisation will improve cost efficiency without compromising investment quality

diagnostic_signals.signal: Research provider panel >20 firms with bottom-5 providers receiving <5% of votes but same contract structure
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Panel rationalisation will improve leverage and reduce admin overhead

diagnostic_signals.signal: Research consumption not systematically tracked per fund making budget accountability difficult
diagnostic_signals.confirms: Implementing research management platform will improve cost governance

required_data_fields: Research cost by provider and fund (12 months)
Broker vote allocation data
Portfolio manager research utilisation and feedback by provider
MiFID II/SEBI compliance framework for research payments
Research management platform options and integration requirements

source_verification_note: industry_sources entries indicate the published works that directionally support each lever's savings thesis. Where no external benchmark was found, INTERNAL_CALIBRATION is noted. All cited sources are real publications; specific savings percentages remain internal calibrations unless the source directly cites a matching range.
